name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 58 of operational silence. **MASHHAD-MURAL-REFUTATION WINDOW EXPIRED (Day 8 of 7) — CONFIRMED VIA INDEPENDENT VERIFICATION May 4-5: NO verified public video, audio, or live appearance.** April-circulated 'command center video' debunked as AI-generated by Grok and Iran International. State media (IRNA, IRIB, Tasnim) has not released or reported verified live appearance. Statements continue to be issued in writing via state TV reading. CNN Apr 21: 'leader no one has seen.' Iran International ongoing coverage confirms regime using AI-generated videos to project messages — fueling speculation Mojtaba is incapacitated or abroad. Through the highest-pressure events of the crisis arc — Trump's Apr 30 Axios rejection, May 1-3 14-point proposal, May 4 kinetic restart — Mojtaba operationally silent. The Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier 'figurehead not principal' framing operationally vindicated; IRGC inner circle led by Vahidi dominates. ISW Day 8 'unable to seriously impact Iranian decision-making due to injuries' framework intact. Per intel.md A7: UNCHANGED — one-line reference; non-event IS the signal. The 'shameful defeat' Khamenei statement attributed in some headlines May 3-4 was issued via state-media reading rather than verified live presence — Day 58 absence holds.
